texto: Don’t give up on trying everyday
autor: those who gave up yesterday are living today regretting that they never tried again and again.
explicacao: Citação de those who gave up yesterday are living today regretting that they never tried again and again. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Don’t give up on trying everyday” articula reflexao, bamigboye-olurotimi, trying em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
